headline.en: UNI reclaims $3.25 on v4 fee catalyst and TVL uptick, but net inflation caps upside — tactical long, structural skeptic.
headline.zh: UNI 借 v4 fee 催化剂与 TVL 回升重回 $3.25, 但净通胀压制空间 — 战术偏多, 结构存疑。

keyChanges.en: Price +16.99% over 7d, bouncing off the $3-3.5 retail capitulation zone on $267M daily volume.
keyChanges.zh: 7 日涨幅 +16.99%, 在 $3-3.5 散户投降区间反弹, 日成交 $267M 放量确认。

keyChanges.en: V4 Protocol Fees temp check is live on Snapshot — first governance catalyst to expand the buyback revenue base since UNIfication.
keyChanges.zh: V4 Protocol Fees temp check 已在 Snapshot 启动 — UNIfication 后首个能扩大回购收入基数的治理催化剂。

keyChanges.en: Still net inflationary: $8.03M annual buyback burns ~2.47M UNI vs 20M emission, absorbing only 12.4% of new supply (+1.96%/yr net).
keyChanges.zh: 仍处净通胀: 年化回购 $8.03M 销毁约 2.47M UNI, 对应 20M 增发仅吸收 12.4% 新供给 (年化净通胀 +1.96%)。

contrarianObservation.en: The buyback is USD-denominated, so a UNI rally mechanically shrinks the number of tokens burned per dollar — meaning every leg up makes the net inflation math WORSE unless protocol revenue scales faster than price. The rally is reflexively self-defeating; smart shorts fade strength above $4 unless fee revenue trends confirm.
contrarianObservation.zh: 回购预算以美元计价, UNI 上涨会机械性减少每美元销毁的代币数量 — 即价格每上一台阶, 净通胀数学反而恶化, 除非协议收入增速快于币价。反身性让上涨自我削弱; 聪明空头会在 $4 上方逢高做空, 除非 fee 收入趋势确认。

watchNext.en: V4 Protocol Fees temp check result and whether it advances to a binding on-chain vote within 2-3 weeks.
watchNext.zh: V4 Protocol Fees temp check 结果, 以及是否在 2-3 周内推进至具约束力的链上投票。

watchNext.en: Real-yield RFC activity — its absence from the forum top-5 signals the staker-cash-flow pivot is NOT imminent; watch for a fresh thread.
watchNext.zh: Real-yield RFC 动态 — 其未出现在论坛前五说明质押现金流方案尚未临近, 关注是否有新贴出现。

watchNext.en: Weekly protocol revenue trend: needs to sustain above $1.2M/wk to plausibly flip net inflation without a v4 fee turn-on.
watchNext.zh: 协议周度收入趋势: 需持续 $1.2M/周以上, 才能在不启动 v4 fee 情况下扭转净通胀。

fullReasoning.en: UNI is bouncing off the $3-3.5 retail capitulation zone with a 17% weekly gain and TVL up 5.33% to $3.01B — tactically bullish over 1-4 weeks. The V4 Protocol Fees temp check is the live catalyst; if it advances to an on-chain vote and passes, it plugs the DEX's fastest-growing surface into the buyback pipe and reprices the revenue base. Structurally, however, this remains a net-inflationary asset: $8.03M/yr in buybacks against 20M UNI/yr of emission means burns absorb only 12% of new supply. Spot $3.25 sits 45% below the DAO's own $5.96 burn anchor, giving ~83% upside to fair value — that's the long thesis. But derivatives are a blackout (Bybit 403, no OI, no funding, no L/S ratio), so we cannot confirm positioning, forcing confidence to medium not high. Forum activity is dominated by v4 hook infrastructure work (URC-2/3/4), not the real-yield RFC, suggesting the staker-yield pivot is not imminent — this is a burn-regime trade, not a cash-flow re-rating. The Foundation dispute over Cantina bounty finding #784 is governance noise, not thesis-breaking. Play: accumulate weakness toward $3.10-3.20, trim into $3.80-4.00 on temp-check passage, invalidate below $2.95.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 在 $3-3.5 散户投降区间反弹, 周涨 17%, TVL 上升 5.33% 至 $3.01B — 1-4 周维度战术性偏多。V4 Protocol Fees temp check 是当前活跃催化剂; 一旦推进至链上投票并通过, 将把 DEX 增长最快的板块接入回购管道, 重塑收入基数。但结构上, UNI 仍是净通胀资产: 年化回购 $8.03M 对应 20M UNI 年度增发, 销毁仅吸收 12% 的新增供给。现价 $3.25 相对 DAO 自身 $5.96 销毁锚定价折价 45%, 上行空间约 83% — 这是做多论点核心。然而衍生品数据全线缺失 (Bybit 403, 无 OI、无 funding、无多空比), 无法验证持仓结构, 因此信心只能定为中等而非高位。论坛热度集中在 v4 hook 基础设施 (URC-2/3/4), 而非 real-yield RFC, 说明质押分红机制尚未临近 — 这仍是 burn 机制下的交易, 而非现金流估值重估。Foundation 对 Cantina bounty finding #784 的争议属治理噪音, 不动摇论点。交易思路: $3.10-3.20 弱势区分批建仓, temp check 通过后于 $3.80-4.00 减仓, 跌破 $2.95 止损。
